name_en: Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam
name_cn:
Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam
Material: % Imported pure cotton / Imported calfskin!
Must-have for students 👍 Must-have for business trips and travel 👍 Must-have for daily work 👍 Size 31✕16✕46cm
